hero.name: Patryck Moulaz
hero.title: Full-Stack .NET Developer
hero.description: Specialized in creating scalable and robust solutions. Currently developing government compliance and health surveillance systems in Rio de Janeiro.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Learn more about my journey and experience
about.description1: I am a full-stack developer passionate about technology and solving complex problems. With over 5 years of experience, I have been building robust and scalable solutions using the .NET ecosystem and modern frontend technologies.
about.description2: Currently, I work for the Rio de Janeiro Government, developing critical health surveillance systems that directly impact the lives of thousands of people. My expertise ranges from RESTful and GraphQL API architecture to mobile application development with Flutter and React Native.
about.description3: I believe that good code is easy to understand, maintain, and scale. That's why I'm always studying new technologies and seeking to apply development best practices in every project.
